steps.title: Identify the cause question
steps.content: Perez and colleagues tested whether soil microbes affected plants' flavor chemistry. The sentence says variations in glucosinolates could not be pinned specifically on soil microbes.

steps.title: Reject mismatched verbs
steps.content: Choice A means prevented, Choice B means undermined, and Choice D means left out or barred. The needed phrase means explained as caused by or linked to. The answer is C.
